steps.title: Open vs Closed Position
steps.text: In OPEN positions with pawns on both wings, the bishop is usually better — its long diagonals reach everywhere. In CLOSED positions with fixed pawns, the knight is usually better — it can jump over.

steps.title: Fischer's Dictum
steps.text: Bobby Fischer famously said "the bishop is stronger" — but only in simplified positions. The truth: know what kind of position favors each piece, and aim to trade into the one that favors YOUR piece.
